svg.title: Full system architecture for Tamil/Telugu language learning app with emotion-aware AI tutor, multimodal input, and therapist dashboard
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: Mobile app (React Native), Backend services (FastAPI), and Data layer (Postgres, Redis, Vector DB)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I build multimodal AAC input in React Native?')
sendPrompt('How does emotion detection work in the mobile app?')
sendPrompt('How do I build script stroke-order animation in React Native?')
sendPrompt('What does the neuro-inclusive UX setting panel include?')
sendPrompt('How does the progress and badge UI work for children?')
sendPrompt('How does the parent and therapist dashboard work on mobile?')
sendPrompt('What does Firebase Auth handle in this app?')
sendPrompt('What are the main FastAPI routes I need to build for the MVP?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI tutor service work with Claude API and Google STT?')
sendPrompt('How does the emotion-aware engine detect frustration and respond?')
sendPrompt('How does the Intelligent Tutoring System adapt lessons?')
sendPrompt('What data goes into the therapist progress report export?')
sendPrompt('How is cultural content managed and served?')
sendPrompt('What is a session event bus and why do I need one?')
sendPrompt('What does the PostgreSQL schema look like for this app?')
sendPrompt('What does Redis cache in this app?')
sendPrompt('When do I need a vector database like Pinecone and what for?')
